metadata.description: Shareable onboarding-driven finance organizer for individuals and small businesses.

plugins.name: finance-organizer
plugins.description: Interview-based setup, then Finance Inbox triage & filing and configurable bookkeeping (Beancount or simple ledger), tailored to the user's company structure, accounts, locality/tax, and branding. Optional related-party, claims, payment-plan, and brand-output modules.
